title: No Ender Pearl Damage
description: No Ender Pearl Damage is a lightweight Fabric mod that prevents players from taking damage when teleporting with ender pearls. Enjoy safe and seamless teleportation with a clear on-screen message!
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/103e88ecda460d653ca0c7372b9cb955b4e2d746.jpeg)


# No Ender Pearl Damage

**No Ender Pearl Damage** is a lightweight, performance-friendly Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5+ by DarkHazzard that makes teleporting with ender pearls completely safe and enjoyable. When you use an ender pearl, you won’t take any damage—instead, you'll see a stylish action bar message in the Ender Pearl's signature color, confirming your teleport was safe.

---

## ✨ Features

- **No More Damage:** Ender pearl teleportation never hurts players again.
- **Clear Feedback:** Sleek action bar message appears every time you teleport.
- **Classic Look:** Message uses the classic Ender Pearl color.
- **Plug & Play:** No setup needed—just add the mod and play.
- **Multiplayer Ready:** Works perfectly on servers; only the server needs the mod.
- **Ultra Lightweight:** No lag, no bloat, just pure quality of life.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the latest `.jar` from the Files tab.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Make sure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for Minecraft 1.21.5+.
4. Launch Minecraft and enjoy safer teleportation!

---

## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: Who is the author of this mod?**  
A: This mod is developed and maintained by DarkHazzard.

**Q: Which Minecraft versions does this mod support?**  
A: This mod is designed for Minecraft 1.21.5 and above. Check the Files tab for updates.

**Q: Do I need to configure anything?**  
A: No. The mod works out of the box. Just install and play!

**Q: Is this mod compatible with multiplayer servers?**  
A: Yes! Only the server needs to have the mod installed for it to work for all players.

**Q: Does this mod change anything else about ender pearls?**  
A: No, it only removes the teleportation damage and adds a feedback message.

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.5+ (check Files for updates)
- **Modloader:** Fabric (Forge not supported)
- **Server/Client:** Works on both, but only the server needs the mod for multiplayer.

---

## 📣 Feedback & Contributions

Suggestions, issues, or ideas? Leave a comment or open an issue on GitHub—contributions are welcome!

---

Enjoy your Minecraft adventures with zero teleportation damage!
